policy: Install only through official Ableton, Arturia, or vendor account flows. Do not commit downloaded pack installers, samples, presets, plugins, or account artifacts.
automation_boundary: DAW/account automation is in scope when it uses official app, account, or in-app store surfaces operated from an authorized session and records only redacted receipts plus refreshed inventory metadata.

allowed_surfaces: Analog Lab or Pigments in-app store
requires_action_time_confirmation: privileged helper or OS password prompt
must_not: commit installers, plugins, samples, presets, browser profiles, cookies, licenses, or account artifacts

items.name: Drum Booth
items.install_route: Ableton Live Browser > Packs, or Ableton account if licensed.
items.local_signal: Present in Live database pack index; absent from installed Factory Packs places.
items.project_use: Dry room acoustic drums for punk kit attack and reinforcement under electronic drums.

items.name: Drum Essentials
items.install_route: Ableton Live Browser > Packs; official page lists Live 12 compatibility.
items.local_signal: Present in Live database pack index; absent from installed Factory Packs places.
items.project_use: Core drum racks, MIDI clips, and one-shots for fast beat sketching and kit layering.

items.name: DM-307A Free Pack

items.project_use: Industrial, house, techno, and organic percussion for alien drum layers.

items.name: Spectral Textures

items.name: Electronica Selection
items.install_route: Acquire through Arturia Sound Store, then synchronize/install in Analog Lab, Pigments, or Arturia Software Center.
items.local_signal: Arturia Software Center and Analog Lab V are installed; this specific bank is not verified as owned.
items.project_use: Organic motion, granular detail, cinematic layers, and abstract analog tones.
